Value: FAIR-curated binary ISSR dataset and reproducible computational workflow for genetic diversity analysis of Tamarindus indica in Ecuador

Hechavarria-Hernandez JR, Pérez-Almeida I, Vacacela Gomez C. Tamarindus_ISSR_EC: FAIR-curated binary ISSR dataset and reproducible computational workflow for genetic diversity analysis of Tamarindus indica in Ecuador [data set]. Zenodo; 2026. https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20276986
Sarmiento L, Pérez-Almeida I, Díaz B, Álvarez H, Viera W. Molecular marker-based characterization of Ecuadorian dry forest tamarind plus trees. Bioagro. 2017;29(3):153-162.
NumPy; pandas; SciPy; scikit-learn; matplotlib; umap-learn

Curated FAIR-compliant repository integrating binary ISSR data, harmonized metadata, reproducible Python workflows, publication-quality figures, and supporting documentation for genetic diversity analysis.
